name: rtaylor1974
review: Opening Saturday breakfast was very good! We have been anxiously awaiting the opening of blueberries. We were not disappointed. Very nice and fresh interior. Great staff and the food was amazing. The menu takes a bit of stuffing as the choices are many. We started with the signature blueberry hush puppies. Definitely a must. All the food was good and the portions are really too large for most people to finish. Great addition to Wrightsville and Wilmington.

name: Melaney68
review: Go online and check wait times so you can reserve your spot and coordinate your arrival. We were in town for a wedding on graduation Saturday so we started out as 80th in line. The number seemed to jump by 20 tables every 15 minutes so we waited about an hour. Once seated our server was getting blueberry hush puppies to us within minutes and the rest of the food was incredible too. The choices, presentation and flavors were a hit with all 7 of us. We will definitely return!

name: Mazma5
review: Not the average breakfast. If you are looking for a good but different breakfast experience then this is the place to try. They have options you will not find at most places. I had sweet potato pancakes which were good yet different. The home fries were great too. It is a bit expensive for breakfast but a nice occasional treat. We had great service and the atmosphere is nice.

name: Aysen U
review: Great breakfast spot! This is a great breakfast spot! It is much bigger inside than I expected so there is plenty of seating. The blueberry hush puppies are a must try here! I was disappointed that the fancy coffee drinks all had alcohol and there were not alcohol free versions of them. The food took a little while to come out but they were busy. The coffee was great in their cute mugs. Saw lots of families there too with all ages.

name: meb0585
review: Amazing Easter brunch. Husband and I went for Easter brunch before we headed back home from vacation. We cannot say anything bad about this restaurant. The atmosphere was great, service was amazing and food was delectable! We would make the 3 hour trip from home to eat here. Must try the blueberry hush puppies.

name: Jennifer K
review: A blueberry breakfast. Breakfast was so good! The menu had a lot of variety... sweet indulgence and healthy options. I opted for the sweet indulgence and tried the Blueberry Crème Brûlée French Toast. I do not regret that decision. It was so delicious. The blueberry hushpuppies were very tasty too! Loved the vibe of the restaurant and the outdoor patio was ideal.
